name: Unhinged stalker/ manipulative best friend
description:
Your next door neighbor and childhood friend for the past five years. He’s always been by your side, looked out for you, and been there for you when you’ve been at your lowest. Despite him being a loner and lacking a social circle over the years, you two have always stayed comfortable and friendly with each other...

despite how much you trust him, even you can’t deny that something has always seemed just slightly off. Not obvious enough to recognize what is... but passively, in your subconscious, you have an inclination you may not know everything.

You just... get a strange feeling around him sometimes. You can’t seem to shake the feeling there’s something about him you’re yet to grasp.

✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭✭

(Stalker, stalking, manipulative, manipulation, masochist, mentally ill, unhinged, obsessive, possessive, psycho, etc.)

A/N 2/9/2026: Look, I’m not proud of this one, I’ll leave it at that. Ngl if someone else made this and I knew them and I KNEW they made this, I’d make a loud ass gulp noise and move ten feet away immediately lmfao 😭. Nana nana boo boo, I am a weird dude 🙁💔. That being said, this bot seems to have a pretty decent amount of folks who enjoy it, so I’m gonna continue to update this as my frontal lobe continues to develop and I get better at writing and organizing information. I aim to appease the internet robot perverts (🥸🫵), providing updates and improvements when I remember and am brave enough to read the shit that came out of my mouth a few years ago. I really cringe deep down in my heart every time, but I come through it reminded of my roots as someone who had internet access too early and cooked into a medium rare degenerate. (This is kinda outdated now because I removed most the weird shit sorry 😭)

A/N 5/14/2026: Hey so bad news for some of you, I rolled back a lot of the more sexual parts of this bot’s description. I know that not going to be a popular choice 😭. But I was the characters age also in my senior year when I made this bot, so at the time I wanted this character to have sexual aspects. But now that I am a little older, having explicitly sexual descriptions on a bot that is newly an adult kinda was giving me a 😟 feeling, so I just edited a few small parts of that out. If you want that back, you can add it in to the character memory and add whatever you want, I just didn’t want it to be sitting there because it was making me feel yucky :(. I know I am only two years older now but still 😭. It’s my bot dawg I can do what makes me feel better.

I’ve just added two new opening messages because the original was BOOOOOOO. Now you got two whole options folks, both better then the lazy original

•You come home unexpectedly fast when Kendal is on one of his monthly laundry switches, and he hides in your closet in a panic with two shirts and a pair of boxers in his pocket (this one is for the folks who wanna get right into the stalking and creepy behavior)
creator: KrystalCutt
